description: Get dressed in these beaded wedges from catwalk for a wonderful ethnic look. The beaded straps lend a dose of festivity to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Synthetic straps in a thong design for a snug Fit Heavily beaded design for added style Soft synthetic lining for all day comfort Midsole Synthetic leather covered footbed with stitch detailing for added style Outsole Wedge heels for better support TPU outsole with wave pattern on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
